news.headline: Barbara Bush Foundation celebrates literacy in Miami with Florida Celebration of Reading, featuring Gov. Jeb Bush and popular authors at Coral Gables Branch Library.
news.summary: A foundation recently organized the Florida Celebration of Reading that included speeches by Governor Jeb Bush and renowned authors Jessica Soffer and Coco Mellors. The event took place at the Coral Gables Branch Library in Miami on February 28, 2025. It also marked the commencement of a new series of family literacy activities to be held nationwide.

news.headline: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR) announces tax information for 2024 distributions: Total dividend per share: $0.095, ordinary dividend: $0.0095, qualified dividend: $0.00, nontaxable dividend: $0.0855.
news.summary: Clipper Realty Inc. (NYSE: CLPR), a company that owns and manages multifamily residential and commercial properties in the New York metropolitan area, disclosed the Federal income tax treatment for its 2024 dividends for common stockholders. On March 27, 2024, the record date was set, and the payable date was scheduled for April 4, 2024. The total dividend per share was $0.0950, categorized as $0.0095 for ordinary dividends and $0.0855 for nontaxable dividends. Similarly, on May 21, 2024, with a payable date of May 30, 2024, the company declared another dividend of $0.0950 per share, divided into $0.0095 for ordinary dividends and $0.0855 for nontaxable dividends.

news.headline: Tech stocks, Tesla (TSLA) up 2.71% and NVIDIA (NVDA) up 1.37%, led rebound as PCE data hints at Fed rate cuts. 4.25% yield on 10-year Treasury note down 15bps this week. Personal spending down, income soared. Tariff concerns persist.
news.summary: Stocks saw a positive recovery on Friday, as all three major indexes showed gains. The tech sector, in particular, rebounded from losses on Thursday, with NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) up by 1.37% and Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) rising by 2.71%. Before the market opened, the release of PCE data brought some relief to investors, as the price index saw its first decrease in four months. Data from the CME FedWatch Tool suggests reinforced expectations for about two quarter-point cuts to the Fed funds rate in 2025. The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note dropped to 4.25% on Friday, following a decline of over 15 basis points this week to its lowest level in more than two months. Personal spending took an unexpected dip in January, while income surged, and concerns over tariffs persisted.

news.headline: Trump Org submits trademarks for Metaverse, NFT platforms. Numerous applications signal move into virtual world.
news.summary: This week, the Trump Organization submitted multiple trademark applications hinting at a potential metaverse project linked to blockchain technology and cryptocurrency transactions. The filings totalled dozens in number, suggesting a significant effort in developing a themed virtual environment tied to digital assets.

news.headline: MAIRE and KBTU sign MoU to boost cooperation in science & education for energy transition. Milan, Feb 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Milan on February 28, 2025, MAIRE announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding with Kazakh-British Technical University (KBTU) to bolster international cooperation in research and education. This partnership aims to drive innovation and development in the energy sector. The agreement signifies a commitment to collaboration between the two institutions to advance shared goals, with a particular focus on fostering academic and research exchanges.

news.headline: ChatGPT, an AI language tool, has surged in popularity and is now a global sensation in just a few months.
news.summary: ChatGPT has gained significant attention in the field of artificial intelligence in a short period, becoming a prominent player internationally.

news.headline: Global BNCT market valued at USD 251M with 38.7% CAGR growth, shaping future cancer treatment.
news.summary: The market for Boron Neutron Capture Therapy (BNCT) is categorized based on type into Thermal Beam and Epithermal Beam, and by application into Brain Tumor and Extracranial Tumor. In BANGALORE, India, as of February 28, 2025, the global BNCT market reached a value of USD 251 million.

news.headline: CME Group executives to present at 2025 Raymond James Annual Institutional Investors Conference. Global Head of Fixed Income Mike Dennis and Executive Director of Investor Relations Adam Minick will participate.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 28, 2025, CME Group, the top derivatives marketplace globally, shared news that Mike Dennis, their Global Head of Fixed Income, and Adam Minick, the Executive Director of Investor Relations, are set to speak at the 46th Annual Raymond James Institutional Investors event. This event marks an important opportunity for the company to showcase their expertise and insights to a wide audience.

news.headline: SEC to host roundtable on AI March 27th.
SEC: AI roundtable will discuss the risks, benefits, and governance of AI in the financial industry.
Historic Brown Chapel AME Church & African American Cultural Heritage Action Fund mark 60th anniversary of Bloody Sunday in Selma, AL on March 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Selma, Alabama, a national coalition comprising civil rights leaders, preservation advocates, and community members will convene on March 9, 2025, to mark the 60th anniversary of the historic event known as "Bloody Sunday." This significant gathering aims to commemorate a pivotal moment in America's Civil Rights Movement.

news.headline: Applied Aerospace receives Supplier Excellence Award from Northrop Grumman for third year in a row, part of top 50 partners.
news.summary: In Stockton, California on February 28, 2025, Northrop Grumman Corporation, listed on NYSE as NOC, honored Applied Aerospace for the third year in a row as one of its top 50 supplier partners at the Supplier Excellence Awards ceremony. This recognition highlights Applied Aerospace’s consistent performance and partnership with Northrop Grumman.

news.headline: PSEG Long Island warns customers about potential scams during Consumer Protection Week from March 2-8, 2025.
news.summary: Residents in Uniondale, New York are being warned of potential fraudulent calls threatening to disconnect their power. PSEG Long Island issued a statement ahead of National Consumer Protection Week, advising customers to be aware of scammers' tactics. The company emphasized the importance of staying alert and taking appropriate action if faced with such a situation. As part of the warning, individuals were urged to avoid disclosing personal information or making any payments in response to these threats. The initiative coincides with the national campaign running from March 2 to March 8, aiming to educate the public about safeguarding against deceptive practices. It is crucial for consumers to exercise caution and report any suspicious activity to prevent falling victim to scams.

news.headline: US gross Natural Gas production in texas rose to a record high in December - EIA.
Bitcoin is down 14% in 7 days due to receding liquidity. Post-election rally fading, BTC dropped 20% from peak. Ethereum also affected.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has decreased by 14% in the last week, leading to discussions among experts regarding the impact of decreasing liquidity on this market correction. Mentioning in a post on X, UnlimitedFnds Chief Investment Officer Bob Elliott highlighted the diminishing post-election crypto rally trend, observing several assets returning to their previous levels. Bitcoin's value has fallen by 20% since its post-election high, reflecting a wider decline in the cryptocurrency market. Furthermore, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) has also faced similar market conditions. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Rights to vote and capital are being discussed, crucial numbers involved.
Indexes saw mild gains in stock market Friday after inflation reading revealed no surprises. Nasdaq bounced off key level.~93 characters
news.summary: On Friday, buyers pushed the stock market indexes to slight increases following the latest inflation data, which held no major shocks. The Nasdaq saw a rebound from a critical level, while Palantir faced ongoing challenges.

news.headline: BoE Gov. Bailey is a top candidate to lead the global finance watchdog.
Investors are eager to wager on the lifting of sanctions against Russia, driving market activity.
See Starmer's speech resembling "Love Actually" scene. Watched by just over 1 million viewers.
Trump to Zelenskiy: You're running low on soldiers, then you’re telling us you don’t want a ceasefire.
US Crude oil production in Texas fell in December to the lowest since July 2024 - EIA.
Responsible Flushing Alliance's 2024 Annual Report released; #FlushSmartMonth success emphasized. Meeting invite extended.
news.summary: Media, wastewater officials, and wipes manufacturers are welcome to attend the 2025 Annual Meeting hosted by the Responsible Flushing Alliance (RFA) in Seattle on February 28, 2025. The organization's 2024 Annual Report has been published, emphasizing the achievements of #FlushSmartMonth campaigns and continuous endeavors.

news.headline: 5G Network Slicing market to reach $5.07 billion by 2030 with a projected CAGR of 43.3%, starting growth at 25% in 2025.
news.summary: Dublin – A report on the 5G network slicing market, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, forecasts significant growth from $840 million in 2025 to $5.07 billion by 2030, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 43.3%. The annual growth rate is expected to start at 25% in 2025 and increase to 60% by 2030, indicating substantial acceleration over the period. The report delves into various aspects such as infrastructure, spectrum band, segment, industry vertical, application, and services, offering insights into the market trends and opportunities.

news.headline: Trump & Zelenskiy Meeting Devolves to Arguement
JPMA urges tariff exemptions for baby products amid US-China trade tensions to maintain affordability for families.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Mt. Laurel, New Jersey, the Juvenile Products Manufacturers Association (JPMA) issued a letter to the Trump Administration. This action was taken following the imposition of tariffs on Chinese products on February 4, aimed at addressing imbalanced trade practices. The JPMA specifically requested an exclusion mechanism to be established. This move comes amidst escalating trade tensions and could impact a wide range of goods.

news.headline: On 2/28, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, LTC, LINK, AVAX analysis shows BTC's recovery & potential altcoin movement.
news.summary: The recent surge in Bitcoin's value, showcasing a significant rebound, indicates a continued interest from buyers looking to capitalize on lower price points. This rising trend prompts the question: will alternative cryptocurrencies also experience similar reversals in value?

news.headline: V&V Supremo Foods, Inc. certified as a Great Place to Work® based on employee feedback. 83% rate it positively.
news.summary: In Chicago, on February 28, 2025, V&V Supremo Foods, Inc. announced their certification as a Great Place To Work®. This recognition is determined by feedback from current employees on their work experience with the company. Impressively, this year, 83% of employees reported that V&V Supremo Foods, Inc. is a fantastic place to work.

news.headline: Trump tells Zelenskiy his comments were very disrespectful.
Trump, Zelenskiy, and US VP Vance argue in the oval office.
Enzymatica AB to host digital press briefing on March 5, 2025, presenting results from 2 studies on ColdZyme. Time: 13:00–14:10.
news.summary: Enzymatica AB is hosting a digital press briefing on March 5, 2025, to discuss the results of two separate research studies on ColdZyme. The event will take place from 13:00 to 14:10. During the briefing, researchers involved in the studies will present their findings and be open for discussion.

news.headline: Kraton Corporation increases global prices by up to 25% on turpentine refined products, effective immediately.
news.summary: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas called Kraton Corporation, specializing in sustainable specialty polymers and high-value bio-based products from pine wood pulping co-products, has declared a general price surge of as much as 25% on Turpentine refined items. This development was announced on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Trump to Zelenskiy: You either make a deal, or we are out.
Aracion partners with Keysight to enhance CATR FR1 OTA testing capabilities in UK, India, UAE, Singapore, China, and the U.S.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 28, 2025, Aracion, an internationally recognized test lab operating in multiple countries including the UK, India, UAE, Singapore, China, and the U.S., revealed a significant partnership with Keysight Technologies. The aim of this collaboration is to implement CATR FR1 OTA testing capabilities, subsequently enhancing their services.

news.headline: Trump: It is going to be very hard to do business like this.
Flex LNG filed its 2024 Annual Report on Form 20-F with SEC as of Dec 31, 2024. Announcement made on Feb 28, 2025 in Bermuda via PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Bermuda's Hamilton on February 28, 2025, Flex LNG Ltd disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The report contains essential data related to the Company's financial performance and operations during the specified period.

news.headline: Sunset World Group in Cancun launched permanent campaign in Feb to combat scams targeting its members and guests.
news.summary: In early February 2025, Sunset World Group unveiled a new ongoing initiative in Cancun, Mexico to tackle scams, particularly targeting its members and visitors. The group is actively sharing updated details on fraudulent schemes through its website and various communication channels.

news.headline: Trump to Zelenskiy: You are gambling with World War III. You don't have the cards right now.
Nutrien Ltd. has filed its 2024 Annual Report (TSX and NYSE: NTR), available on SEC and SEDAR websites.
news.summary: Nutrien Ltd. has disclosed its 2024 Annual Report, MD&A, and Audited Financial Statements, along with its Annual Information Form, for public access. These documents are now accessible on the US SEC's EDGAR website (www.sec.gov) and the Canadian Securities Administrators' website (www.sedarplus.ca). Investors and stakeholders can review and download the 2024 Annual Report from these sources. Nutrien Ltd. is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker symbol NTR.

news.headline: CUPE Ontario vows to resist Ford's agenda, representing 290,000 public sector workers, despite his failed election bid.
news.summary: In Toronto, Doug Ford strategically took advantage of a time of national and global chaos to regain power for the Conservatives in Ontario. Despite his opportunistic actions, Ford did not secure the significantly larger majority he had claimed as justification for the expensive and unwarranted election. CUPE Ontario, representing 290,000 public sector employees in the province, highlighted Ford's shortcomings, suggesting that this outcome will strengthen their resolve to resist the Conservatives' controversial policies.

news.headline: Stocks saw a 'Trump Bump' after his win, but the rally faded in February. S&P 500 on course for worst week of 2019.
news.summary: Following President Trump's victory, stocks experienced a significant surge, but this trend largely shifted in February. By Friday, the S&P 500 was headed for its most challenging week of the year, signifying a notable downturn in market performance.

news.headline: GU announces "UG" clothing line with UNDERCOVER, launching March 14, 2025. Aimed to enhance fashion offerings.
news.summary: Set to be released on Friday, March 14, 2025, in New York City, GU, a brand under Fast Retailing Group and sister brand of UNIQLO, has revealed the introduction of "UG", a fresh clothing line developed in collaboration with UNDERCOVER. The anticipated launch of "UG" is scheduled for March 14, 2025, marking a significant stride forward in the fashion world.

news.headline: Trump: I’m not aligned with Putin; I'm aligned with the US and the good of the world.
4106 PR, LLC buys Point Royale Apartments in Victoria, TX for $11.4M on Feb. 27, 2025.
news.summary: 4106 PR, LLC has recently purchased Point Royale Apartments in Victoria, Texas for $11.4 million. The multi-family residential community is situated at 4106 John Stockbauer Drive and the acquisition was completed on February 27, 2025.

news.headline: Phase 1 Epstein Files reveal disappointments as flight logs and contact list release by AG falls short of expectations.
news.summary: The attorney general's release of flight logs and Jeffrey Epstein's contact list drew criticism from individuals anticipating them to unveil fresh details, with the new information failing to meet these expectations.

Global news app market grows at 17.7% CAGR, valued at USD 11.46B in 2023, projected to reach USD 36.32B.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of February 28, 2025, the News Application Market has been categorized into types such as Android, iOS, and Web App, and applications including Subscription Service and Advertisement. The market was valued at USD 11,460 million in 2023, with projections indicating potential growth to reach USD 36,320 million.
